title: Check all events in codecompanion.nvim usage/events.md for suitability for token counting and aggregation (e.g., tokens/s read/write)
description:
Analysis of events for token counting and aggregation:

Events suitable for token counting and aggregation (e.g., tokens/s read/write):
- CodeCompanionRequestStarted
- CodeCompanionRequestStreaming
- CodeCompanionRequestFinished
- CodeCompanionChatSubmitted
- CodeCompanionChatDone
- CodeCompanionInlineStarted
- CodeCompanionInlineFinished

Reasoning: These events correspond to API calls, chat submissions, and inline interactions where tokens are read/written. They are ideal for counting tokens and measuring throughput. Other events are not directly related to token usage.

Recommended aggregates:
- Total tokens read/written per request
- Tokens per second during streaming
- Tokens per chat
- Tokens per inline interaction
- Aggregates by adapter/model (from event payloads)

Other events are not recommended for token counting.

title: Implement per-turn token delta tracking and logging
